violations.rule_title: Todo list command must use shorthand (not 'list-todos')
violations.description: The 'list' command for todos should be named 'list' following standard shorthand for primary objects
State-display commands for specific secondary objects must use the status suffix

violations.rule_title: Required arguments should use flags when they're named/optional, not positional args
violations.description: Use flags (--todo-id) for named arguments instead of positional args to improve clarity and flexibility
violations.change_description: Changed argument from '<todo-id>' to '<id>' (violates clarity rule)
